task.title: Team Collaboration Todo Application
task.description: Develop a comprehensive team collaboration todo application with user authentication, multi-user support, real-time collaboration features, and role-based access control.

deliverables.description: User authentication system with login, registration, and password recovery
User data model with role-based permissions
Todo item data model with assignment and status tracking
Database schema with relationships for users, todos, and teams
REST API routes for user management, todo operations, and team collaboration
Security middlewares for authentication, authorization, and rate limiting
Real-time features using WebSockets for collaborative updates
Frontend UI components for todo management, user profiles, and team views
Comprehensive testing suite for backend APIs and frontend components
Deployment configuration files for production environment
